cases.name: filter node where property value appears in a literal list
cases.cypher: match (s) where s.name in ['option 1', 'option 2'] return s

cases.name: cross-product filter where two nodes match different typed properties
cases.cypher: match (s), (e) where s.name = '1234' and e.other = 1234 return s

cases.name: filter node where a scalar value appears in an array property
cases.cypher: match (n) where 1 in n.array return n

cases.name: filter typed node with coalesce equality on both sides
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where coalesce(n.name, '') = coalesce(n.migrated_name, '') return n

cases.name: filter node using an arithmetic expression in the WHERE clause
filter typed node using toLower contains with a compound AND predicate
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where n:NodeKind1 and toLower(n.tenantid) contains 'myid' and n.system_tags contains 'tag' return n

cases.name: filter typed node where a scalar appears in an array property concatenated with a literal list
cases.cypher: match (n:NodeKind1) where '1' in n.array_prop + ['1', '2'] return n

cases.name: return source and an aliased property from an unrelated node in a cross-product
cases.cypher: match (s), (e) where s.name = 'n1' return s, e.name as othername

cases.name: filter cross-product where either node satisfies a different property predicate
cases.cypher: match (s), (e) where s.name = '1234' or e.other = 1234 return s

cases.name: return a size of an array property in the projection
